entries.rationale_summary: Trend break exit: price below SMA50 for 21 consecutive days. Volatility-adjusted stop at 21.50 GBP breached on downside. Position at 70 days held with sustained downtrend and unrealised loss of -0.7973 GBP. Exit reduces portfolio from 6 to 5 positions (at maximum limit) and recovers ~4.58 GBP cash proceeds. Balanced strategy max tolerance is 10 consecutive days below SMA50; this threshold exceeded significantly.
